WELCOME.title: Welcome to LogisX
WELCOME.body: Hi! I'm your guided assistant. I'll walk you through becoming a LogisX truck investor in about 10 minutes. There are 3 steps: your application, your trucks and documents, then your banking. You can pause anytime — everything auto-saves.

OVERVIEW.title: 3 steps, 3 sections
OVERVIEW.body: On the left you'll see 3 steps: Application, Fleet & Documents, and Banking. You're on Step 1 right now. Let's fill it out together — I'll highlight each field as we go.

LEGAL_BASICS.title: Your legal name
LEGAL_BASICS.body: Use the exact name on your ID or business filing. If you're applying as an individual, use your full name (First Last). If you're applying as a company, use the full legal entity name.

DBA_OPTIONAL.title: Doing Business As (DBA)
DBA_OPTIONAL.body: If you operate under a different name than your legal name — like a trade name — enter it here. If not, you can leave this blank.

ENTITY_TYPE.title: What type of business?
ENTITY_TYPE.body: Pick the legal structure of your business. LLC and Corp are for registered companies. Sole Prop is for individual owners with no formal entity. If you're unsure, pick the one that matches what your accountant files.

ADDRESS_HELP.title: Principal business address
ADDRESS_HELP.body: This is your main business or home address. Start typing and we'll suggest matches from Google Maps. You can also click the pin icon to drop a marker on a map, or the target icon to use your current location.

CONTACT_INFO.title: How we'll reach you
CONTACT_INFO.body: Enter a phone number and email we can use to contact you about your application. We'll send a confirmation to the email once you submit, and login credentials once you're approved.

EIN_OR_SSN.title: EIN or SSN
EIN_OR_SSN.body: We need a tax ID to report your earnings. If you're an LLC or Corp, enter your EIN (Employer Identification Number). If you're a sole proprietor or individual, your SSN is fine. Format: 9 digits, with or without dashes.

STEP0_REVIEW.title: Ready to continue?
STEP0_REVIEW.body: Nice work — that's Step 1 done. Click Continue at the bottom to move on to your fleet and documents. If the button is grey, you've missed a required field (legal name, address, phone, email, or EIN/SSN).

FLEET_INTRO.title: Now let's add your trucks
FLEET_INTRO.body: Step 2 has two parts: tell us about your trucks, then sign three documents. Start by entering how many trucks you're adding. You can add between 1 and 20.

VEHICLE_MAKE.title: Truck details: Make
VEHICLE_MAKE.body: For each truck, pick the manufacturer from the dropdown. We support all major brands: Freightliner, Kenworth, Peterbilt, Volvo, International, Mack, and more.

VEHICLE_MODEL.title: Truck details: Model
VEHICLE_MODEL.body: Pick the model. The options update based on the make you just selected. If your exact model isn't listed, pick the closest match — we can confirm later.

VEHICLE_YEAR.title: Truck details: Year
VEHICLE_YEAR.body: Enter the model year. This is on the vehicle title or registration.

VEHICLE_VIN.title: Truck details: VIN
VEHICLE_VIN.body: The VIN is a 17-character code unique to your truck. You can find it on the dashboard, the driver-side door frame, the engine block, or your registration and insurance documents.

DOCS_INTRO.title: Time to sign 3 documents
DOCS_INTRO.body: You need to sign all 3 documents before we can submit your application. Click any card to open it. Inside, you'll see the full document, type your name, draw your signature, and click Sign. Start with the Master Agreement.

MASTER_AGREEMENT_OPEN.title: Open the Master Agreement
MASTER_AGREEMENT_OPEN.body: Click the Master Participation & Management Agreement card. This document describes how LogisX manages your trucks and how you get paid.

VEHICLE_LEASE_OPEN.title: Next: Vehicle Lease
VEHICLE_LEASE_OPEN.body: Now click the Commercial Vehicle Lease Agreement card. This is the lease that puts your trucks under the LogisX operating authority.

W9_OPEN.title: Last: W-9 tax form
W9_OPEN.body: Finally, click the W-9 Tax Form. This is the standard IRS form we need to report your earnings. We pre-fill most of it from what you entered earlier.

STEP1_REVIEW.title: Ready for Step 3?
STEP1_REVIEW.body: You've added your fleet and signed all 3 documents. Click Continue to move on to your banking info. If the button is still grey, check that every truck has a year, make, model, and VIN, and that all 3 documents show as signed.

BANKING_INTRO.title: Your payout account
BANKING_INTRO.body: We pay investors via ACH direct deposit, usually Net-60 from the load delivery date. Enter the bank where you want your payouts sent. Your info is encrypted and stored securely.

BANK_NAME.title: Your bank
BANK_NAME.body: Start typing your bank's name. We'll autocomplete from a list of major US banks. If your bank isn't on the list, keep typing — we'll still accept it.

ROUTING_NUMBER.title: Routing number
ROUTING_NUMBER.body: Your 9-digit bank routing number is on the bottom-left of your check, or in your bank's online banking under account details. All US banks have unique routing numbers.

ACCOUNT_NUMBER.title: Account number
ACCOUNT_NUMBER.body: Enter the account number you want payouts sent to. This is usually next to the routing number on your check, or in your online banking. Double-check this carefully — a wrong number can delay your first payment.

REVIEW_OPEN.title: Review everything
REVIEW_OPEN.body: Click Review & Complete to see a summary of everything you've entered. You'll get one last chance to go back and fix anything before submitting.

REVIEW_WALKTHROUGH.title: Double-check your info
REVIEW_WALKTHROUGH.body: Here's everything you've entered. Account number is masked for security — click the eye icon to reveal it. If anything looks wrong, click Go Back & Edit. Otherwise click Confirm & Complete Onboarding to submit.

SUBMIT_CONFIRM.title: Submit when ready
SUBMIT_CONFIRM.body: Clicking Confirm will submit your application, generate your signed PDFs, and email our team. You'll see a success screen and get a confirmation email within a minute.

COMPLETION.title: You're all done!
COMPLETION.body: Congratulations — your application is submitted. Our team will review it within 1-2 business days, and we'll email you login credentials once you're approved. You'll be redirected to logisx.com in a few seconds.

what_is_logisx.a: LogisX is a trucking logistics company. As an investor, you lease your truck(s) to us. We handle dispatch, loads, insurance, and paperwork. You get paid monthly based on your truck's earnings.

how_long_does_this_take.a: About 10 minutes if you have your documents handy — your ID or EIN, vehicle VINs, and bank routing/account numbers. Your progress auto-saves, so you can pause anytime.

individual_vs_entity.q: Should I apply as an individual or as a company?
individual_vs_entity.a: Apply as whichever entity will own the lease. If your truck is titled under an LLC, apply as the LLC. If you personally own it, apply as an individual. When in doubt, match what your accountant uses for taxes.

what_if_no_dba.q: What if I don't have a DBA?
what_if_no_dba.a: Leave the DBA field blank. It's optional — only fill it in if you operate under a trade name that's different from your legal name.

ein_vs_ssn.q: What's the difference between EIN and SSN?
ein_vs_ssn.a: EIN (Employer Identification Number) is for businesses. SSN (Social Security Number) is for individuals. If you're filing as an LLC or Corp, you need an EIN. If you're a sole proprietor or individual, your SSN works.

why_address.q: Why do you need my address?
why_address.a: We need a principal business address for your tax forms (W-9) and for mailing any physical paperwork. We never share it with third parties.

when_will_i_hear_back.q: How long until I hear back?
when_will_i_hear_back.a: 1-2 business days for an initial review. We email you directly at the address you provide. Once approved, you'll get login credentials to access your investor dashboard.

is_my_data_safe.a: Yes. All data is transmitted over encrypted HTTPS and stored in a secure database. Your SSN/EIN and banking info are never displayed back in full once you submit.

continue_grey.q: Why is the Continue button grey?
continue_grey.a: You're missing a required field. The required fields are: Legal Name, Principal Address, Phone, Email, and EIN/SSN. Fill all of them and the button turns blue.

do_i_need_to_own.q: Do I need to own my truck outright?
do_i_need_to_own.a: You should be the titled owner or lien-holder. If there's an active lien, that's fine — just note it during review. Financed trucks are welcome.

add_more_later.q: Can I add more trucks later?
add_more_later.a: Yes. After approval, you'll have access to your investor dashboard where you can add trucks. For this application, list only the trucks you want to onboard right now.

where_find_vin.q: Where do I find my VIN?
where_find_vin.a: On the driver-side dashboard (visible through the windshield), the driver-side door frame, the engine block, or any of: registration, insurance card, or title.

what_am_i_signing.a: Three documents: (1) Master Agreement — how LogisX manages your truck; (2) Vehicle Lease — the operating authority lease; (3) W-9 — the IRS tax form. All three are standard documents used by freight carriers.

legally_binding.a: Yes. Your electronic signature is legally binding under the ESIGN Act. You'll get a copy of each signed document emailed to you after submission. Read each one carefully before signing.

is_banking_secure.a: Yes. It's encrypted in transit and at rest. We use it only to send you ACH payouts. You can update it any time from your investor dashboard after approval.

how_often_paid.q: How often do I get paid?
how_often_paid.a: Payouts run monthly on Net-60 terms from the load delivery date. You'll see a statement each month with load details and your share.

where_find_routing.q: Where do I find my routing number?
where_find_routing.a: On the bottom-left of a physical check (9 digits, before your account number), or in your bank's online banking under Account Details → Direct Deposit info.

tooltips.form.legal_name: Your exact legal name — must match your tax filing
tooltips.form.dba: Optional — your trade name, if different from your legal name
tooltips.form.entity_type: LLC, Corp, Sole Prop, or Other
tooltips.form.contact_person: Primary point of contact for your application
tooltips.form.email: We'll send confirmation and login details here
tooltips.form.years_in_operation: How many years you've been in trucking (0 is fine for new owners)
tooltips.form.industry_experience: Have you worked in trucking or logistics before?
tooltips.form.preferred_communication: How you'd like us to reach you
tooltips.form.reporting_preference: How you want to receive monthly reports
tooltips.vehicles.titleState: State where the title is registered
tooltips.banking.bank_name: Your bank — autocompletes from major US banks
tooltips.banking.account_name: Name on the account as it appears at your bank
tooltips.banking.routing_number: 9 digits on the bottom-left of your check
tooltips.banking.account_number: Your bank account number for ACH payouts

canProceedStep1_failed.plain: You need to fill in all the required fields before continuing.

allVehiclesValid_failed.plain: Every truck needs a year, make, model, and VIN before you can continue.

signedCount_failed.plain: All 3 documents need to be signed before you can submit.

canSubmitBanking_failed.plain: You need to fill in your bank name, routing number, and account number to submit.
